notes: Chemical kinetics lab: rate law determination, reaction order, collision theory. Quantitative scientific reasoning fits math_scientist.

Astrology/productivity advice; no specialist agent covers astrology. Conservative fallback to universal_agent per guidance.

Coq proof of an arithmetic identity over sums of fourth powers. Pure mathematical reasoning/proof task.
